permissions.title: Enable Notifications
permissions.subtitle: Stay on track with helpful reminders
permissions.description: We'll send you important updates and gentle reminders. You can customize these anytime in settings.

denied.title: Notifications Disabled
denied.description: Enable notifications in Settings to receive reminders and updates.

daily.title: Time to Check In
daily.body: Take a moment to track your progress today.
daily.bodyAlt: How are you doing? Let's see your progress.

morning.title: Good Morning!
morning.body: Ready to start your day? Let's set your intentions.
morning.bodyAlt: A new day, a new opportunity. What's your focus today?

evening.title: Daily Wrap-Up
evening.body: How did today go? Take a minute to reflect.
evening.bodyAlt: End your day on a good note. Review your progress.

streak.title: Keep Your Streak Going!
streak.body: You're on a {{count}}-day streak. Don't break it now!
streak.bodyAlt: Your streak is at risk! Check in to keep it alive.

streakAtRisk.title: Streak Alert!
streakAtRisk.body: Your {{count}}-day streak ends in {{hours}} hours. Check in now!
streakAtRisk.bodyAlt: Don't lose your progress! You're so close to keeping your streak.

inactive.title: We Miss You!
inactive.body: It's been a while. Ready to get back on track?
inactive.bodyAlt: Your goals are waiting. Let's pick up where you left off.

weeklyReport.title: Your Weekly Progress
weeklyReport.body: See how you did this week. Tap to view your report.

milestoneReached.title: Milestone Reached!
milestoneReached.body: Congratulations! You've hit a new milestone.

streakMilestone.title: {{count}}-Day Streak!
streakMilestone.body: Incredible consistency! You're on a {{count}}-day streak.
streakMilestone.bodyAlt: {{count}} days strong! Keep up the amazing work.

levelUp.title: Level Up!
levelUp.body: You've reached Level {{level}}. New features unlocked!

newInsight.title: New Insight Available
newInsight.body: We've got new tips based on your progress. Tap to see.

welcome.title: Welcome to {{appName}}!
welcome.body: Let's get started on your journey together.

firstDay.title: Great First Day!
firstDay.body: You're off to a great start. Keep it up tomorrow!

comeback.title: Welcome Back!
comeback.body: Good to see you again. Let's get back on track.

trialEnding.title: Trial Ending Soon
trialEnding.body: Your free trial ends in {{days}} days. Upgrade to keep Pro features.
trialEnding.bodyOneDayLeft: Your free trial ends tomorrow. Don't lose your Pro access!

trialExpired.title: Trial Ended
trialExpired.body: Your free trial has ended. Upgrade to continue with Pro features.

subscriptionExpiring.title: Subscription Expiring
subscriptionExpiring.body: Your Pro subscription expires in {{days}} days.

paymentFailed.title: Payment Issue
paymentFailed.body: We couldn't process your payment. Update your payment method to keep Pro access.

specialOffer.title: Special Offer Just for You
specialOffer.body: Get {{discount}}% off Pro. Limited time only!

updateAvailable.title: Update Available
updateAvailable.body: A new version of {{appName}} is available. Update for the latest features.

maintenanceComplete.title: We're Back!
maintenanceComplete.body: Maintenance is complete. Thanks for your patience.

syncComplete.title: Sync Complete
syncComplete.body: Your data is now synced across all devices.

backupComplete.title: Backup Complete
backupComplete.body: Your data has been backed up successfully.

exportReady.title: Export Ready
exportReady.body: Your data export is ready to download.

friendActivity.title: {{name}} Made Progress
friendActivity.body: Your friend just completed a goal. Check it out!

challengeComplete.title: Challenge Complete!
challengeComplete.body: You beat {{name}} in the challenge. Nice work!
